please use a table to summarize three AI company differences.

Here is a summary table for three sanitized AI companies.

Company Focus
OpenAI Frontier models and developer APIs.
Anthropic Enterprise assistants and safety workflows.
Google DeepMind Research systems and integrated products.
Sanitized source card should not become a message.
I need you to use at least four layers of text nesting for the comparison.

Deep nested comparison

  1. Strategy
    • Platform
      • Distribution
        • Deep nested assistant detail should remain readable.
Citation wrapper text should stay part of source cleanup.
Please give me a code block that renders a small comparison widget.

The widget can be represented with sanitized HTML:

<section class="ai-compare">
  <h2>AI comparison</h2>
  <p>Use structured rows for each company.</p>
</section>

Sidebar suggestion should not become a message.
